data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for emergency exceptions.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Emergency exceptions' requirement, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the concept of emergency exceptions but lacks specific evidence of its implementation or tracking mechanism. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive as there is no definitive proof of the requirement being met.
gaps: No evidence of how emergency exceptions are tracked or applied.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the emergency exceptions requirement.
